节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The context of form extension. It allows access to formExtension-specific resources.
Start an ability. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - includes ability name, parameters and relative info sending to an ability.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - The callback of startAbility.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - The application is not a system application.
@throws { BusinessError } 16500050 - An IPC connection error happened.
@throws { BusinessError } 16500100 - Failed to obtain the configuration information.
@throws { BusinessError } 16501000 - An internal functional error occurred.

parameters.说明: includes ability name, parameters and relative info sending to an ability.

error_codes.description: The application is not a system application.
Failed to obtain the configuration information.

error_codes.description: The application is not a system application.

节点.功能描述:
Connect a service extension ability. If the target service extension ability is visible, you can connect the target service extension ability; If the target service extension ability is invisible, you need to apply for permission:ohos.permission.START_INVISIBLE_ABILITY to connect target invisible service extension ability. If the target service extension ability is in cross-device, you need to apply for permission:ohos.permission.DISTRIBUTED_DATASYNC.

This method can be called by an ability or service extension, but the destination of the connection must be a service extension. You must implement the {@link ConnectOptions} interface to obtain the proxy of the target service extension when the Service extension is connected.

1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - Indicates the service extension to connect.
@param { ConnectOptions } options - Indicates the callback of connection.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - The application does not have permission to call the interface.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000001 - The specified ability does not exist.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000004 - Can not start invisible component.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000005 - The specified process does not have the permission.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000006 - Cross-user operations are not allowed.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000011 - The context does not exist.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000053 - The ability is not on the top of the UI.

parameters.说明: Indicates the service extension to connect.

error_codes.description: The application does not have permission to call the interface.
The specified ability does not exist.
The specified process does not have the permission.
The ability is not on the top of the UI.

节点.功能描述: Disconnect an ability to a service extension, in contrast to {@link connectServiceExtensionAbility}. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } connection - the connection id returned from connectServiceExtensionAbility api.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - The callback of disconnectServiceExtensionAbility.
@throws { BusinessError } 16000011 - The context does not exist.

parameters.说明: the connection id returned from connectServiceExtensionAbility api.
